english: to get / to receive / to catch
notes: Colloquial synonym for 'bekommen' (to get/receive). Also used in the sense of 'to catch' someone or something. Very common in spoken German.

sentences.german: Ich kriege heute ein Paket geliefert.
sentences.english: I'm getting a package delivered today.

sentences.german: Sie hat endlich den Job gekriegt, den sie wollte.
sentences.english: She finally got the job she wanted.

sentences.german: Die Polizei hat den Dieb gekriegt.
